findings.summary: The Phase 4 implementation sketch introduces async model resolution into Maestro's current synchronous spawn-argument pipeline.
findings.evidence: The plan proposes `export async function resolveOmpModel(...)` and `await fs.readFile(configPath, 'utf-8')` in plan.md:991-1005. Maestro currently uses synchronous argument assembly contracts in src/main/utils/agent-args.ts:45-48 and 118-121, defines synchronous `argBuilder` callbacks in src/main/agents/definitions.ts:37 and 56, and consumes those utilities directly in src/main/ipc/handlers/process.ts:157-177, src/main/ipc/handlers/tabNaming.ts:125-137, src/main/utils/context-groomer.ts:196-210, src/main/group-chat/group-chat-agent.ts:157-167, and src/main/group-chat/group-chat-router.ts:464-472, 855-864, 1240-1248, 1411-1421.
findings.impact: Implementers cannot land the phase exactly as written without widening scope beyond the stated target file set or breaking the current argument-assembly contract.
findings.recommended_fix: Revise Phase 4 to either use a synchronous config read inside agent-args.ts or explicitly convert the shared argument-assembly pipeline and all affected call sites to async, updating target files and acceptance checks accordingly.
